name: ATM
overview: Four street-smart youngsters from the slums of Hyderabad earn their living by carrying out petty crimes. What happens when one such scam backfires and compels them to loot a bank's cash van?

trailers.title: ATM |ZEE5 Original Series| Official HD Trailer| VJ Sunny| Harish Shankar| Dilraju|Premieres 20th Jan
